text:
Stage 1 is defined as a persistent area of skin redness (without a break in the skin) that does not disappear when pressure is relieved.
408 M1B M1B_STAGE_2_ULCER (M1B) Stage 2 Ulcers CHAR 1 Skin condition: ulcers - stage 2 in last 7 days. This field indicates the number of stage 2 ulcers on the resdient's body. Stage 2 is defined as a partial thickness loss of skin layers that presents clincially as an abrasion, blister, or shallow crater.
409 M1C M1C_STAGE_3_ULCER (M1C) Stage 3 Ulcers CHAR 1
